title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Jayabheri Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Jayabheri Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jayabheri Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Jayabheri Group:
Jayabheri Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jayabheri Group!
